lines.speaker: Sylas
lines.text: Ah, [player name]! Good to see you again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How is the collection going now?

lines.speaker: Sylas
lines.text: Thanks to you finding the golden goblin for me, I am the envy of the collector's group. I can't thank you enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I've lost Rupert's helmet.

lines.speaker: Sylas
lines.text: Not to worry, [player name] Go and speak to Rupert. These items have a strange way of returning to their owners sometimes!

lines.speaker: Sylas
lines.text: No, no. Thanks for everything you've done!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just happy that I could help. Goodbye!

lines.speaker: Sylas
lines.text: You there, you look like you could use some beans!

lines.speaker: Sylas
lines.text: Buy 1 bean get a bean free!
